backstory.original: Havilar's twin sister Farideh has always been 'the smart one' and 'the responsible one'-but that's all right, Havilar is definitely 'the tough one,' 'the funny one' and the 'pretty one' (despite being identical twins). Plus, Havilar has a hellhound! Even if it means she's a sort-of-but-not-quite Chosen of Asmodeus, too, not that anyone asked Havi about that. But he should know her glaive is as good as her right hand, and she can slice a devil just as well as an orc, a zombie, or any other villain!
backstory.display: 哈维拉的双胞胎姐妹法莉德，一直是“比较聪明的那个”和“负责任的那个”--但是没关系，哈维拉绝对是“更强悍的那个”和“更有趣的那个”以及“更漂亮的那个”（尽管她们是双胞胎）。此外，哈维拉有一只地狱犬！这件事“有一点但不完全能”说明她与阿斯摩蒂斯有关，但没人问过哈维拉这个问题。要知道，她的剑刃和她的右手一样厉害，无论是恶魔、兽人、僵尸或任何其他坏人，她都能切成两半！

description.original: Havilar cleaves the closest enemy with her Glaive, hitting all nearby enemies.
description.display: 哈维拉用她的阔剑顺劈距离最近的敌人，同时对附近所有敌人造成伤害。

description.original: An imp flings itself at a random enemy and explodes in a large area.
description.display: 一个小魔鬼冲向一名随机敌人并爆炸，波及一大片范围。

longDescription.original: An imp flings itself at a random enemy and explodes in a large area, dealing ultimate damage and granting a bonus to its buff. The imp is resummoned a short time later.
longDescription.display: 一个小魔鬼冲向一名随机敌人并爆炸，波及一大片范围，造成杀招伤害并使其增益效果获得加成。该小魔鬼会在一小会儿后被重新召唤。

description.original: Havilar increases the damage of Champions close behind her. This ability is augmented based on the Imps she currently has assisting her.
description.display: 哈维拉提高身后与她相邻的勇士伤害。此技能会根据当前协助她的小魔鬼而获得增幅。

description.desc: Havilar increases the damage of herself and all Champions in the 2 columns behind her by $amount%.
哈维拉会使她自己和所有处于她身后 2 列中的勇士伤害提高 $amount%。

tipText.original: Havilar is a tank who increases the damage of those in the two columns behind her.
tipText.display: 哈维拉是坦克型勇士，可以提高身后两个纵队的伤害。

description.desc: When any Fiend enemies are on-screen, Havilar focuses less on her own attacks and more on buffing her party. Her base attack cooldown is doubled, but the effect of Leadership Summit is increased by $amount___3% for each Fiend that has appeared in the current area, stacking multiplicatively and capping at $max_stacks___4. Fiend bosses count 15 times.
当屏幕上有任何炼狱生物敌人时，哈维拉将作战重点从自身发动攻击转为加强队伍成员。当前区域内每有一名炼狱生物出现，她的基本攻击冷却时间加倍，但“领袖巅峰”的效果提升 $amount___3%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 $max_stacks___4 层。炼狱生物首领按 15 倍计算。

Havilar gains Mot as her first Imp companion. Havilar's Imps attack random enemies with Fire of Asmodeus every 4.3 seconds. Mot increases the effect of Leadership Summit by $amount___2% for each Tiefling or Dragonborn Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
哈维拉获得莫特作为她的第一个小魔鬼伙伴。哈维拉的小魔鬼每隔 4.3 秒会用“阿斯摩蒂斯之炎”攻击随机敌人。阵型中每有一名提夫林或龙裔勇士，莫特会使“领袖巅峰”的效果提高 $amount___2%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Havilar travels with two imps: Mot and another chosen by a specialization choice. The imp you choose determines how her Leadership Summit ability is further buffed.
tipText.display: 有两个小魔鬼伴随着哈维拉一起前行：一个是莫特，另一个由专精选择决定。你选择的小魔鬼会决定她的“领袖巅峰”技能进一步的增益效果。

description.desc: Havilar increases the health of all other Champions by $amount% of her max health, and healing effects on all Champions are increased by $amount___2%.
哈维拉增加所有其他所有勇士的生命值，数值相当于她最大生命值的 $amount%，并且所有勇士受到的治疗效果提高 $amount___2%。
Fiend enemies have a $amount% chance of dropping two quest items or counting for two kills when killed.
炼狱生物敌人在被击杀时，有 $amount% 的几率掉落两件任务物品，或计作两次击杀。

Champions affected by Havilar's Leadership Summit gain the Control role (if they didn't already have it) and have a $amount___2% chance for enemies they attack to go berserk for $berserk_time___2 seconds. Berserked enemies move 50% faster, attack twice as often, but deal 90% less damage.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Adds the Control role and enemies hit by $target have a $(active_upgrade_value 18040,1)% chance to go berserk

description.desc: 受哈维拉“领袖巅峰”影响的勇士会获得控制角色定位（如果他们之前尚未拥有），并且他们攻击的敌人有 $amount___2% 的几率发狂 $berserk_time___2 秒。发狂的敌人移动速度增加 50%，攻击频率加倍，但造成的伤害减少 90%。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 增加控制角色定位，并且被$target击中的敌人有 $(active_upgrade_value 18040,1)% 的几率发狂

description.desc: Havilar gains Dembo as an Imp companion. Dembo increases the effect of Leadership Summit by $amount___3% and if Mehen is in the formation, he gains 2 additional Grumpy stacks (he doesn't like Dembo).

effect_keys.condition_description: Havilar has Dembo as an Imp companion (+2 stacks)

description.desc: 哈维拉获得登博作为小魔鬼伙伴。登博会使“领袖巅峰”的效果提高 $amount___3%，并且如果梅亨在阵型中，他会额外获得 2 层“暴躁”堆叠层数（他不喜欢登博）。

effect_keys.condition_description: 哈维拉获得登博作为小魔鬼伙伴。（堆叠层数 +2）

specializationDescription.original: Havilar chooses Dembo as her second imp, making Mehen just a bit more grumpy.
specializationDescription.display: 哈维拉选择登博作为她的第二个小魔鬼，让梅亨变得更暴躁。

description.desc: Havilar gains Olla as an Imp companion. Olla increases the effect of Leadership Summit by $(not_buffed amount___3)% for each unique enemy Havilar has tanked in the current area, stacking multiplicatively and capping at $max_stacks___3. Additionally, when Havilar or either of her Imps attack an enemy, the enemy is taunted to attack Havilar.
哈维拉获得奥拉作为小魔鬼伙伴。在当前区域内，哈维拉每承受过一个敌人的伤害，奥拉会使“领袖巅峰”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount___3)%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 $max_stacks___3 层。此外，当哈维拉或她的任意一个小魔鬼攻击一名敌人，该敌人会被嘲讽，转而去攻击哈维拉。

specializationDescription.original: Havilar chooses Olla as her second imp, buffing her damage as she tanks more enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 哈维拉选择奥拉作为她的第二个小魔鬼，当她承受更多敌人的攻击时提高她的伤害。

description.desc: Havilar gains Bosh as an Imp companion. Bosh increases the effect of Leadership Summit by $(not_buffed amount___3)% for each enemy or boss enrage stack active, stacking multiplicatively up to $stack_func_cap___3 stacks, and also increases Havilar's maximum health by $amount___4%.
哈维拉获得波什作为小魔鬼伙伴。每有一层正在生效的来自敌人或首领的怒气堆叠，波什会使“领袖巅峰”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount___3)%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 $stack_func_cap___3 层，同时还会使哈维拉的最大生命值增加 $amount___4%。

specializationDescription.original: Havilar chooses Bosh as her second imp, increasing her health and her damage against enraged enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 哈维拉选择波什作为她的第二个小魔鬼，提高她的生命值和她对被激怒的敌人造成的伤害。

description.desc: Increase the effect of Leadership Summit by $amount% when Farideh is in the formation. Additionally, whenever Farideh's Hellish Rebuke is triggered, Havilar heals for up to $amount___2% of her maximum health. This can trigger at most $max_stacks___2 times in a single area.
当法莉德在阵型中时，“领袖巅峰”的效果提高 $amount%。此外，每当法莉德的“炼狱叱喝”触发时，哈维拉会恢复最多相当于她最大生命值 $amount___2% 的生命值。此效果在一个区域内最多可触发 $max_stacks___2 次。

The Imp that isn't Mot flings itself at a random enemy and explodes, dealing massive damage in a large area and increasing the Imp's buffs by 400% for 60 seconds. The imp's buffs do not go away when it is sacrificed, and the Imp is automatically resummoned next to Havilar after 20 seconds.
除莫特以外的小魔鬼冲向一名随机敌人并爆炸，造成大范围高额伤害，并使该小魔鬼的增益效果提高 400%，持续 60 秒。当该小魔鬼牺牲后，它的增益效果不会消失，并会在 20 秒后被自动重新召唤回到哈维拉身边。

description.original: You owe me one!
description.display: 你欠我一次！

description.original: A great leader needs a splash of color, don't you think?
description.display: 一个伟大的首领需要一抹亮色，你不觉得吗？

description.original: Ok, let me recap.
description.display: 好了，让我总结一下吧。

description.original: My glaive is more than just a weapon. It's... a big weapon.
description.display: 我的阔剑不只是一把武器。还是......一把超大的武器。

description.original: Knock me down, and you are going to RUIN this outfit.
description.display: 把我打倒的话，你会毁掉这身衣服。

description.original: Do you know what? I think this is really Tiamat!
description.display: 你知道吗？我觉得这是真的提亚马特！

description.original: Sometimes, you need to block a few hits to find your opening.
description.display: 有的时候，需要阻挡几下攻击才能开始你的回合。

description.original: The whole multiverse is in danger? Ugh, again?
description.display: 整个多元宇宙都有危险？啊，又来？

description.original: You were always afraid it would come to this. But I was eager.
description.display: 你们唯恐事情走到这步田地。可我很急。

description.original: Meet Mot, Dembo, Ola, and Bosh. They're my posse!
description.display: 认识一下莫特、登博、奥拉和波什。他们是我的武装小队！

description.original: Watch and follow me, but NOT TOO CLOSE!
description.display: 跟着我，好好看，但别跟太近！

description.original: Is anyone else getting a headache? Just me?
description.display: 还有没有谁感觉头痛吗？只有我愿意吗？

description.original: You're right, Mot. It IS pretty funny when they charge us.
description.display: 你说得对，莫特。他们向我们冲锋的时候真的很有趣。

description.original: Hold 'em still, Mot! This next swing's gonna STING!
description.display: 按住他们，莫特！我这一击会让他们痛得要命！

name.original: As Good As Her Right Hand

description.original: You guys know I'm real good at attackin' stuff with my glaive.
description.display: 你们知道我很擅长用我的长矛攻击东西。

effects.description: Increases the chance for enemies to go berserk from Havilar's Battlemaster ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Faster, Zoonie! Kill! Kill!
description.display: 再快点儿，祖尼！杀啊！杀啊！

description.original: Dembo! Leave my dad alone and HELP ME!
description.display: 登博！别管我爸了，快来帮我！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Havilar's specializations by $amount%

description.original: Hey, Olla! I've got room for one more over here!
description.display: 嘿，奥拉！我这儿还有一个位置！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Havilar's specializations by $amount%

description.original: I KNOW WE'RE SURROUNDED, BOSH! THAT'S WHAT I WANT!
description.display: 我知道我们被包围了，波什！那正是我想要的！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Havilar's specializations by $amount%

description.original: Vajra said you need me along for protection!
description.display: 跋折罗说你需要我的保护！

description.original: Look at this! I would look fantastic in this!
description.display: 快瞧瞧这个！穿在身上肯定会很好看！

description.original: UGH, no horns? How am I supposed to look cool?!
description.display: 啊，没有角？那我还怎么扮酷？！

effects.description: Havilar also counts as a Half-Elf

description.original: Somethingsss Ssstrange... Wait, WHERE IS MY HAIR?!
description.display: 嘶嘶……有点奇怪……等等，我的头发呢？

effects.description: Havilar also counts as a Yuan-ti

description.original: This is a hellhound? She's too cute to be scary!
description.display: 这是地狱犬吗？太可爱了一点都不吓人！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Havilar's specializations by $amount%

description.original: Zoonie! Imps are not chew toys! I don't care if it squeaks when you bite it!
description.display: 祖尼！小魔鬼不是让你啃咬的玩具！我不管它被你咬的时候是否发出了唧唧声。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Havilar's specializations by $amount%

description.original: All right, I'm on. Let's go for a run--NO! STOP CHASING THAT OWLBEAR!
description.display: 好，我坐上来了。准备好--停！别去追那头枭熊。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Havilar's specializations by $amount%

description.original: ...You know what, Zoonie? You can eat as many gnolls as you can catch. Get 'em!
description.display: ......祖尼，我告诉你哦？你抓到多少豺狼人都归你吃。去吧！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Havilar's specializations by $amount%

description.original: ...I don't think this name strikes FEAR into my enemies.
description.display: ......这个名字似乎并不太震慑人。

description.original: Mehen says my glaive doesn't need a name, I need to watch my stance. DISAGREE!
description.display: 梅亨说我的阔剑不需要什么名字，反而是我需要多加练习。我不同意！

description.original: Bonus points if you can find the liver on a hezrou when I'm finished!
description.display: 等我完成后你要是能在狂战魔身上找到肝脏就算你赢！

description.original: That's right! Watch out, Nine Hells!
description.display: 没错！九层地狱，你给我小心点吧！

description.original: I look anything but common in this.
description.display: 穿着它我一点都不平凡。

description.original: I asked the seamstress to add a slit in it, just in case combat breaks out.
description.display: 我让女裁缝特别留了一个切口，以防万一面对战斗。

description.original: Two long sleeves, two halves of a glaive. It's perfect! As long as I don't move much.
description.display: 两个长袖，各寸半段阔剑。完美！只要行走时不要有太大的动作就行。

description.original: Hey, I worked for this. And it is WORKING for me!
description.display: 哇，这是我努力工作得来的。现在轮到它来效劳我了！

description.original: 'You order, we act. That's the deal.'
description.display: “你指挥，我们动手。交易就是这样简单。”

description.original: 'When your economy becomes this inflated, you have to reset. That's the rule.'
description.display: “当通货膨胀到这种地步时，就要重置。规则就是如此。”

description.original: 'Don't turn around! The world doesn't exist behind you!'
description.display: “别转过头！你就是世界的尽头！”

description.original: 'Lady, I'm mostly sure you're not supposed to be doing this!'
description.display: “女士，我很确定你不能这样子做的！”

description.original: Farideh, hold still--I want to see how this would look on me.
description.display: 法莉德你别动--我想自己试用下看看效果。

description.original: The ribbon makes it slash faster--that does so make sense, Farideh!
description.display: 丝带能让阔剑劈砍得更迅速--很有道理是不是，法莉德！

description.original: If someone grabs me by the ribbon, worrywart, I'll chop their hands off.
description.display: 有谁敢碰我的丝带的话，我就砍掉对方的双手。

description.original: For your information, bossyboots, the pattern hides the dried monster brains.
description.display: 我跟你说吧，这图案掩盖着干涸的怪物脑袋。

description.original: Brin and I have read this to each other about a hundred times.
description.display: 布兰和我曾经互相朗诵此书上百遍。

description.original: Little did she know, the curse was true love. And also beholders.
description.display: 但她不知道的是，该诅咒是真爱。也是旁观者。

description.original: I love Brin, but his family is crazy. But also crazy entertaining.
description.display: 我很爱布兰，但是他的家人都是疯子。都玩得很疯。

description.original: For best experience, get Brin to do the lonely widow's voice! Hilarious!
description.display: 要想得到最佳的体验，就让布兰配音孤独寡妇的角色吧！很好笑的！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Male Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Tiefling Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: Havilar's twin sister Farideh has always been 'the smart one' and 'the responsible one'-but that's all right, Havilar is definitely 'the tough one,' 'the funny one' and the 'pretty one' (despite being identical twins). Plus, Havilar has a hellhound! Even if it means she's a sort-of-but-not-quite Chosen of Asmodeus, too, not that anyone asked Havi about that. But he should know her glaive is as good as her right hand, and she can slice a devil just as well as an orc, a zombie, or any other villain!
character_sheet_details.system_description: Havilar is a tanking fighter who summons (and sacrifices) Imps to aid her and her companions in battle.

event_upgrades.name: Leadership Summit
event_upgrades.description: Havilar increases the damage of Champions close behind her. This ability is augmented based on the Imps she currently has assisting her.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 哈维拉的双胞胎姐妹法莉德，一直是“比较聪明的那个”和“负责任的那个”--但是没关系，哈维拉绝对是“更强悍的那个”和“更有趣的那个”以及“更漂亮的那个”（尽管她们是双胞胎）。此外，哈维拉有一只地狱犬！这件事“有一点但不完全能”说明她与阿斯摩蒂斯有关，但没人问过哈维拉这个问题。要知道，她的剑刃和她的右手一样厉害，无论是恶魔、兽人、僵尸或任何其他坏人，她都能切成两半！
character_sheet_details.system_description: 哈维拉是坦克型战士，能够召唤（以及牺牲）小魔鬼，在战斗中为自身和队友提供帮助。

event_upgrades.name: 领袖巅峰
event_upgrades.description: 哈维拉提高身后与她相邻的勇士伤害。此技能会根据当前协助她的小魔鬼而获得增幅。

original.name: Glaive Thrust
original.description: Havilar cleaves the closest enemy with her Glaive, hitting all nearby enemies.

display.name: 利刃斩刺
display.description: 哈维拉用她的阔剑顺劈距离最近的敌人，同时对附近所有敌人造成伤害。

original.name: Heroic Sacrifice
original.description: An imp flings itself at a random enemy and explodes in a large area.
original.long_description: An imp flings itself at a random enemy and explodes in a large area, dealing ultimate damage and granting a bonus to its buff. The imp is resummoned a short time later.

display.name: 英勇牺牲
display.description: 一个小魔鬼冲向一名随机敌人并爆炸，波及一大片范围。
display.long_description: 一个小魔鬼冲向一名随机敌人并爆炸，波及一大片范围，造成杀招伤害并使其增益效果获得加成。该小魔鬼会在一小会儿后被重新召唤。

original.name: Leadership Summit
original.tip_text: Havilar is a tank who increases the damage of those in the two columns behind her.

display.name: 领袖巅峰
display.tip_text: 哈维拉是坦克型勇士，可以提高身后两个纵队的伤害。

original.name: Mot
original.tip_text: Havilar travels with two imps: Mot and another chosen by a specialization choice. The imp you choose determines how her Leadership Summit ability is further buffed.

display.name: 莫特
display.tip_text: 有两个小魔鬼伴随着哈维拉一起前行：一个是莫特，另一个由专精选择决定。你选择的小魔鬼会决定她的“领袖巅峰”技能进一步的增益效果。

original.name: Dembo
original.specialization_description: Havilar chooses Dembo as her second imp, making Mehen just a bit more grumpy.

display.name: 登博
display.specialization_description: 哈维拉选择登博作为她的第二个小魔鬼，让梅亨变得更暴躁。

original.name: Olla
original.specialization_description: Havilar chooses Olla as her second imp, buffing her damage as she tanks more enemies.

display.name: 奥拉
display.specialization_description: 哈维拉选择奥拉作为她的第二个小魔鬼，当她承受更多敌人的攻击时提高她的伤害。

original.name: Bosh
original.specialization_description: Havilar chooses Bosh as her second imp, increasing her health and her damage against enraged enemies.

display.name: 波什
display.specialization_description: 哈维拉选择波什作为她的第二个小魔鬼，提高她的生命值和她对被激怒的敌人造成的伤害。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: You owe me one!

display.name: 无私
display.description: 你欠我一次！

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: A great leader needs a splash of color, don't you think?

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 一个伟大的首领需要一抹亮色，你不觉得吗？

original.name: Tough
original.description: My glaive is more than just a weapon. It's... a big weapon.

display.name: 坚韧
display.description: 我的阔剑不只是一把武器。还是......一把超大的武器。

original.name: Resilient
original.description: Knock me down, and you are going to RUIN this outfit.

display.name: 韧性
display.description: 把我打倒的话，你会毁掉这身衣服。

original.name: Imp Brigade
original.description: Meet Mot, Dembo, Ola, and Bosh. They're my posse!

display.name: 小魔鬼旅
display.description: 认识一下莫特、登博、奥拉和波什。他们是我的武装小队！

original.name: Defensive Duelist
original.description: Sometimes, you need to block a few hits to find your opening.

display.name: 防守型决斗者
display.description: 有的时候，需要阻挡几下攻击才能开始你的回合。

original.name: Connoisseur of Fancy Things
original.description: Look at this! I would look fantastic in this!

display.name: 花俏物品鉴赏家
display.description: 快瞧瞧这个！穿在身上肯定会很好看！

original.name: Vajra's Summons
original.description: Vajra said you need me along for protection!

display.name: 跋折罗的召唤
display.description: 跋折罗说你需要我的保护！

original.name: Glaive Finesse
original.description: Watch and follow me, but NOT TOO CLOSE!

display.name: 阔剑手法
display.description: 跟着我，好好看，但别跟太近！

original.name: Heavily Armored
original.description: Do you know what? I think this is really Tiamat!

display.name: 重甲
display.description: 你知道吗？我觉得这是真的提亚马特！

original.name: Prodigal Leader
original.description: Ok, let me recap.

display.name: 浪荡首领
display.description: 好了，让我总结一下吧。

original.name: Raven Mirror
original.description: You were always afraid it would come to this. But I was eager.

display.name: 渡鸦之镜
display.description: 你们唯恐事情走到这步田地。可我很急。

original.name: As Good As Her Right Hand
original.description: You guys know I'm real good at attackin' stuff with my glaive.

effects.description: Increases the chance for enemies to go berserk from Havilar's Battlemaster ability by $(amount)%

display.name: 和她的右手一样好
display.description: 你们知道我很擅长用我的长矛攻击东西。

effects.description: 使敌人因哈维拉“战斗大师”技能而发狂的几率提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Half-Elf Glitch
original.description: UGH, no horns? How am I supposed to look cool?!

effects.description: Havilar also counts as a Half-Elf

display.name: 半精灵变异
display.description: 啊，没有角？那我还怎么扮酷？！

effects.description: 哈维拉也算作半精灵

original.name: Yuan-ti Glitch
original.description: Somethingsss Ssstrange... Wait, WHERE IS MY HAIR?!

effects.description: Havilar also counts as a Yuan-ti

display.name: 蛇人变异
display.description: 嘶嘶……有点奇怪……等等，我的头发呢？

effects.description: 哈维拉也算作蛇人

original.name: Calm Under Pressure
original.description: The whole multiverse is in danger? Ugh, again?

display.name: 从容应对
display.description: 整个多元宇宙都有危险？啊，又来？

original.name: Abyssal Sensitivity
original.description: Is anyone else getting a headache? Just me?

display.name: 深渊敏感性
display.description: 还有没有谁感觉头痛吗？只有我愿意吗？

original.name: Impish Glee
original.description: You're right, Mot. It IS pretty funny when they charge us.

display.name: 小魔鬼欢欣
display.description: 你说得对，莫特。他们向我们冲锋的时候真的很有趣。

original.name: Bedeviled
original.description: Hold 'em still, Mot! This next swing's gonna STING!

display.name: 痛苦折磨
display.description: 按住他们，莫特！我这一击会让他们痛得要命！

original.name: High Road to Hell
original.description: Faster, Zoonie! Kill! Kill!

display.name: 通往地狱的坦途
display.description: 再快点儿，祖尼！杀啊！杀啊！

original.name: Infernal Assistance
original.description: Dembo! Leave my dad alone and HELP ME!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Havilar's specializations by $amount%

display.name: 地狱的协助
display.description: 登博！别管我爸了，快来帮我！

effects.description: 使哈维拉的专精效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Infernal Alliance
original.description: Hey, Olla! I've got room for one more over here!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Havilar's specializations by $amount%

display.name: 地狱同盟
display.description: 嘿，奥拉！我这儿还有一个位置！

effects.description: 使哈维拉的专精效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Infernal Amity
original.description: I KNOW WE'RE SURROUNDED, BOSH! THAT'S WHAT I WANT!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Havilar's specializations by $amount%

display.name: 地狱友好关系
display.description: 我知道我们被包围了，波什！那正是我想要的！

effects.description: 使哈维拉的专精效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Lost Pup
original.description: This is a hellhound? She's too cute to be scary!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Havilar's specializations by $amount%

display.name: 走失的小狗
display.description: 这是地狱犬吗？太可爱了一点都不吓人！

effects.description: 使哈维拉的专精效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Loyal Hellhound
original.description: Zoonie! Imps are not chew toys! I don't care if it squeaks when you bite it!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Havilar's specializations by $amount%

display.name: 忠诚的地狱犬
display.description: 祖尼！小魔鬼不是让你啃咬的玩具！我不管它被你咬的时候是否发出了唧唧声。

effects.description: 使哈维拉的专精效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Warhound Mount
original.description: All right, I'm on. Let's go for a run--NO! STOP CHASING THAT OWLBEAR!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Havilar's specializations by $amount%

display.name: 战犬坐骑
display.description: 好，我坐上来了。准备好--停！别去追那头枭熊。

effects.description: 使哈维拉的专精效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Azounarella the Devourer
original.description: ...You know what, Zoonie? You can eat as many gnolls as you can catch. Get 'em!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Havilar's specializations by $amount%

display.name: 吞噬者阿佐娜瑞拉
display.description: ......祖尼，我告诉你哦？你抓到多少豺狼人都归你吃。去吧！

effects.description: 使哈维拉的专精效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Justice
original.description: ...I don't think this name strikes FEAR into my enemies.

display.name: 正义
display.description: ......这个名字似乎并不太震慑人。

original.name: Kidney Carver
original.description: Mehen says my glaive doesn't need a name, I need to watch my stance. DISAGREE!

display.name: 肾脏雕刻者
display.description: 梅亨说我的阔剑不需要什么名字，反而是我需要多加练习。我不同意！

original.name: Eater of Her Enemies' Livers
original.description: Bonus points if you can find the liver on a hezrou when I'm finished!

display.name: 敌人肝脏吞噬者
display.description: 等我完成后你要是能在狂战魔身上找到肝脏就算你赢！

original.name: Devil Slayer
original.description: That's right! Watch out, Nine Hells!

display.name: 魔鬼克星
display.description: 没错！九层地狱，你给我小心点吧！

original.name: Commoner's Dress
original.description: I look anything but common in this.

display.name: 平民的连衣裙
display.description: 穿着它我一点都不平凡。

original.name: Festive Wear
original.description: I asked the seamstress to add a slit in it, just in case combat breaks out.

display.name: 节庆服饰
display.description: 我让女裁缝特别留了一个切口，以防万一面对战斗。

original.name: Undercover Ball Gown
original.description: Two long sleeves, two halves of a glaive. It's perfect! As long as I don't move much.

display.name: 奸细舞会礼服
display.description: 两个长袖，各寸半段阔剑。完美！只要行走时不要有太大的动作就行。

original.name: The Fanciest Dress
original.description: Hey, I worked for this. And it is WORKING for me!

display.name: 最时髦的连衣裙
display.description: 哇，这是我努力工作得来的。现在轮到它来效劳我了！

original.name: Dembo
original.description: 'You order, we act. That's the deal.'

display.name: 登博
display.description: “你指挥，我们动手。交易就是这样简单。”

original.name: Olla
original.description: 'When your economy becomes this inflated, you have to reset. That's the rule.'

display.name: 奥拉
display.description: “当通货膨胀到这种地步时，就要重置。规则就是如此。”

original.name: Bosh
original.description: 'Don't turn around! The world doesn't exist behind you!'

display.name: 波什
display.description: “别转过头！你就是世界的尽头！”

original.name: Mot
original.description: 'Lady, I'm mostly sure you're not supposed to be doing this!'

display.name: 莫特
display.description: “女士，我很确定你不能这样子做的！”

original.name: Leftover Ribbon
original.description: Farideh, hold still--I want to see how this would look on me.

display.name: 遗留的丝带
display.description: 法莉德你别动--我想自己试用下看看效果。

original.name: Glaive Decorations
original.description: The ribbon makes it slash faster--that does so make sense, Farideh!

display.name: 阔剑装饰品
display.description: 丝带能让阔剑劈砍得更迅速--很有道理是不是，法莉德！

original.name: Elegant Ribbon
original.description: If someone grabs me by the ribbon, worrywart, I'll chop their hands off.

display.name: 优雅的丝带
display.description: 有谁敢碰我的丝带的话，我就砍掉对方的双手。

original.name: Embroidered Ribbon
original.description: For your information, bossyboots, the pattern hides the dried monster brains.

display.name: 绣花丝带
display.description: 我跟你说吧，这图案掩盖着干涸的怪物脑袋。

original.name: Worn Chapbook
original.description: Brin and I have read this to each other about a hundred times.

display.name: 陈旧的故事书
display.description: 布兰和我曾经互相朗诵此书上百遍。

original.name: The Giantess's Curse
original.description: Little did she know, the curse was true love. And also beholders.

display.name: 女巨人的诅咒
display.description: 但她不知道的是，该诅咒是真爱。也是旁观者。

original.name: The Secrets of the Obarskyrs
original.description: I love Brin, but his family is crazy. But also crazy entertaining.

display.name: 欧巴斯奇家族的秘密
display.description: 我很爱布兰，但是他的家人都是疯子。都玩得很疯。

original.name: The Lonely Widow
original.description: For best experience, get Brin to do the lonely widow's voice! Hilarious!

display.name: 孤独的寡妇
display.description: 要想得到最佳的体验，就让布兰配音孤独寡妇的角色吧！很好笑的！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Male Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位男性勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Tiefling Champions by $(amount)%
使所有提夫林勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有体质大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有敏捷大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment
阵型中每有一位善良阵营勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
